headline: Citizens Named to Newsweek’s America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026 List & Wins Top CBA Award for Small Business Program
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., May 11, 2026--Citizens was named to Newsweek’s America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026 list, ranking 15th out of 300 U.S. companies and earning distinction as the highest-ranked New England-based organization. The award, presented in collaboration with Statista, highlights leadership in corporate philanthropy, employee volunteerism, and sustained community investment.
